reviewSummary.sourceStrategy: Only official/operator website pages were reviewed. Entries were added only when the official page exposed a direct downloadable image URL. No Google Images, random web, social media, third-party blog/news, generic unrelated outlet, or AI/generated sources were used. No images were downloaded or imported in this task.
